newInThisVersion.description: Real provider telemetry collection with latency/status probing
Alert thresholds (alert_thresholds) and cost model (cost_model) blocks added
Dashboard PDF/PNG export buttons and config-driven thresholds

migrationNotes: cloud-agents.local.json is now gitignored - create from cloud-agents.local.example
PreTool hooks install to ~/.pretool-hooks/ via bootstrap-machine.ps1
Gentle-Vanguard operates with Opencode + judgment-day for code review
Scripts reorganized into subdirectories: AI-AGENT-MANAGEMENT, UTILITIES, SKILLS-TOOLS, TELEMETRY-METRICS, PERFORMANCE-OPTIMIZATION, DEPLOYMENT, WORKFLOW-ORCHESTRATION
